svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Settlement Updates the Invoice
svg.desc: Helius detects the transfer; the backend verifies it and flips the invoice to SETTLED. Secant stays the source of truth.
svg.text: Helius detects the transfer; the backend verifies it and flips the invoice to SETTLED. Secant stays the source of truth.
Set only after the backend verifies the on-chain
Paid total moves up; open balance moves down.
The settled invoice remains visible for merchant
